name: web_search
description: Search the live web for current information, news, or facts.

name: fetch_content
description: Scrape a URL, extract main content, and return a clean text summary.

name: list_files
description: List files and directories in a specified folder.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to list

name: read_file
description: Read a file with AI-friendly line-based windowing. Returns formatted output with navigation hints.

path.description: Path to the file (relative to resources/)

line_start.description: Starting line number (1-indexed). Use negative values to count from end.

name: write_file
description: Write text content to a file. Creates parent directories if needed.

path.description: Path where file will be written

name: append_to_file
description: Append text content to the end of an existing file without overwriting.

content.description: Text to append to the file

name: replace_in_file
description: Find and replace specific text in a file. If multiple occurrences exist, replaces all.

old_text.description: Text to find in the file

name: insert_after_marker
description: Insert text after a specific marker line in a file. Creates the file if it doesn't exist.

content.description: Text to insert after the marker

name: run_command
description: Execute a shell command within the 'resources/' sandbox directory. Policy blocks dangerous operations (rm -rf, sudo, apt, raw sh). Respects timeout and max_output limits.

max_output.description: Max characters of stdout/stderr to return
